taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Backend service development, API design, development, Java, Spring Boot
skill_match_scores: Backend service development:1.0, API design:1.0, Development:0.5, Java:1.0, Spring Boot:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, MIS, Business Administration, or equivalent experience, Three (3) years of experience developing backend services and APIs, Strong experience with Java and Spring Boot, Experience integrating with legacy systems and complex data layers, Experience designing and consuming REST and/or SOAP services, Experience using AI-assisted development tools (e.g., Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, or similar) to improve developer productivity, code quality, or documentation, Familiarity with relational and non-relational databases, Ability to work across multiple languages and platforms, Ability and willingness to learn IRIS/ObjectScript concepts and proprietary tools, Participation in a rotating on call schedule
preferred_quals: Experience integrating with InterSystems IRIS or similar nontraditional databases, Experience designing or using agentic AI workflows (e.g., AI agents for code generation, refactoring assistance, test creation, or knowledge extraction from legacy systems), Familiarity with integrating AI tools into enterprise development workflows, including prompt engineering, guardrails, and human‑in‑the‑loop validation, Experience working with and/or modernizing legacy systems, Experience with containerized or cloud-based platforms, Familiarity with healthcare or insurance systems, Experience using AI assisted development tools for productivity and code quality
core_responsibilities: Design and implement backend services that integrate modern applications with IRIS based systems, Modernize existing interfaces while preserving business correctness and performance, Define and follow standard API and service design patterns, Partner with IRIS/ObjectScript engineers to ensure proper data access and transaction handling, Perform unit and integration testing; support system and end-user testing, Troubleshoot and resolve production issues related to integrations and services, Contribute to documentation and shared development standards
job_summary: HealthPartners is currently hiring a Software Engineer – Backend Integration & Modernization. This role primarily supports the healthcare claims domain, focusing on modern service development and system integration, connecting IRIS-based core platforms with modern APIs, services, and user experiences.
